title: Pharmacy Deduplication Fix
summary: Fixed duplicate pharmacy entries in the provider list by improving coordinate-based deduplication in the discovery edge function.

changes.message: Increased coordinate precision from 3 to 5 decimal places (~111m → ~1m) in discover-hospitals edge function for accurate deduplication.
Fixed duplicate providers appearing when Google Places and Mapbox return slightly different coordinates for the same location.
Provider list now shows unique pharmacies without duplicate entries at the same physical location.
